prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDKIT-4PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Basic Gold Panning Classification Tools Kit with 1/2" Classifier Screen for Sluice Boxes Description: Be prepared with the right tools when you're in the field gold mining or gold prospecting with the handy ASR Outdoor 4-Piece Gold Panning Accessory Tools Kit. Featuring a 1/2 inch classifier screen and one glass vial, these accessories will help in your gold recovery and storage efforts and are suitable for beginners and seasoned prospectors alike.

The ASR Outdoor plastic gold panning trowels are made from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic. The shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-resistant, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come. In addition to these trowels' formidable construction, the shovels also boast a deep black and green color to help sort and spot and gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals. And, when you're not using the gold panning trowel tool, the handheld shovel can be used in your backyard for gardening purposes, or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden.

For any aspiring and dedicated prospectors, this is a must-have item for gold panning and mineral recovery. The classification screen will aid your efforts by sorting your raw materials based on size. This extra small 1/2 inch particle screen is made of tough, high-impact plastic and 0.1mm stainless steel wire.

Never lose your small valuable items again with the Gold Rush 2 Dram Glass Vial. This durable glass vial will ensure that your craft supplies, gems and other tiny valuables are safe and contained; the glass vials feature a water-tight screw top cap, as well as a durable glass see-through body so you'll be able to identify items easily.
Happy Prospecting. With the right gold panning accessories sand tools, we hope you're able to increase your gold recovery efforts and strike it rich. Search Terms: gold panning recovery prospecting outdoor kit supplies equipment for beginners mining sluice tools pan geology gem stone collecting Features: - GOLD RUSH READY: Be prepared with the right tools when you're in the field gold mining or gold prospecting with the handy ASR Outdoor 4-Piece Gold Panning Accessory Tools Kit; featuring two plastic trowels or scoops, one 1/2 inch classifier screen and one glass vial, these accessories will help in your gold recovery and storage efforts - HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC TROWELS: The reinforced, heavy duty, single piece construction plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel is nonmetallic, rust-free and corrosion resistant, allowing you to use and reuse the gold mining tool for many gold panning seasons to come; the deep black and green colors allow for even the finest gold flakes to stand out from your mineral deposit - MULTIPURPOSE TROWEL SCOOP TOOLS: When you're not using the ASR Outdoor trowels or scoops for gold panning or gold mining, you can utilize the scoop for gardening, as a pooper scooper, to scoop feed or seed, as a kid's scoop at the beach and a wide variety of other tasks - GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear - SPECIFICATIONS: Kit includes: two (2) green and black plastic trowels or scoops, one (1) 1/2 inch classifier screen and one (1) glass vial; Material: plastic sieve and trowels, glass vial; Dimensions: ; Weight: 1.45lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Piece Gold Panning Classification Tools Kit
